haddock-fillet-with-red-onion-and-capers.name: Haddock Fillet With Red Onion And Capers
haddock-fillet-with-red-onion-and-capers.original_name: Red Onion And Kaparili Mezgit Fileto

2. Peel the shell of red onions and cut in the form of round rings.

9.  Afiyet olsun.

halibut-with-sausage.name: Halibut With Sausage

ingredients.prep: casing removed, crumbled, or Spanish-style chorizo, casings removed, thinly sliced

instructions: Prepare a grill for medium heat. (Or preheat an oven to 375°.) Tear 4 sheets of heavy-duty foil to measure about 16x12". Set 2 sheets on a work surface; top each with a remaining sheet of foil (you are making 2 double-layer packets). Divide tomatoes, garlic, rosemary, and nduja between sheets, placing in the center. Season halibut generously with salt and pepper and set on top. Drizzle with wine and oil. Bring opposite sides of foil together in the center; crimp tightly, pressing out air, to close.

Place foil packets directly on grill grates (or a rimmed baking sheet if using oven) and cook until tomatoes are beginning to burst and halibut is opaque all the way through, 14–16 minutes. Let rest at room temperature a few minutes, then carefully open and transfer fish to a platter. Top with tomatoes and cooking juices from packets.
Do Ahead: Packets can be assembled 1 day ahead. Chill.

halloween-tarts-pequerecetas.name: Halloween Tarts

ingredients.item: 2 sheets of broken mass or breeze (you can also wear paddle)
300 g de frutos rojos (frescos o congelados)
A few drops of lemon (for the glass)

instructions: The first thing to do is to prepare the pilling, and that's done at a time. Put the red fruit into a bowl with the sugar and lemon juice. Warm it with medium heat and remove from time to time, till the fruit starts to release its juice. Dilute the maicena in a tablespoon of cold water and add it to the mixture. He cooks a few more minutes, till you figure it's a little thick, as a compot. Then remove him from the fire and let him tempt while preparing his dough.

Expand one of the pieces of broken mass onto the counter and cut some circle something bigger than the mold you'll wear. Fold up the mold with some crumbling butter or spray and place the mass circles, pressurizing them well to suit the walls. Filling each tipstick with one or two tablespoons of the blend of red fruit, without reaching the edge so that it doesn't leave while baking.

With the second mass plate, cut other circles of the same size to cover up the tiptocks. Put the mass tops above them by pressing the edges with your fingers or with a fork to seal them. At the centre put a pint pint, that will put an eye. Then with the cuts of mass that have been left to you, cut pieces with an approximate form of semicircle and place them onto the pines, gluing the edge with a beaten egg.

Fold up the surface of the tights with a beamed egg to get them golden. Take them to the pressurized oven at 180 ° C for about 20 or 25 minutes, or till you see that the dough's golden and crispy. Take them out and let them cool onto a grid.

When they are completely cold, prepare the glasé by mixing the sugar with a few drops of water and some lemon juice, just fair to get a thick texture. With a spoon or a small sleeve, put a little around the plum to simulate the white part of the eye. Let her dry up for a few minutes and get ready.

ham-cheese-chicken-rollups.name: Ham & Cheese Chicken Rollups
instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C (200°C)
Cut about ¾ of the way through the chicken horizontally, making sure not to cut through the other side. Flip the chicken open and flat.
Lay a sheet of plastic wrap on top of the chicken and pound it flatter using a pot or a pan. Remove the plastic wrap.
Season with the salt, pepper, and garlic powder, rubbing the seasoning in evenly. Lay 2-3 slices of ham over the chicken, followed by 4 slices of provolone cheese.
Carefully roll the chicken up.
Transfer the flour, eggs, and breadcrumbs into 3 separate bowls.
Dip the chicken roll into the flour, tapping off any excess, and then into the egg, followed by the breadcrumbs. Place on a baking sheet
Add the broccoli to the baking sheet, mixing it with the olive oil, salt, and pepper. Make sure to save a little oil to drizzle on top of the chicken.
Bake for 20 minutes.
Slice, then serve!
Enjoy!

ham-and-cheese-breakfast-casserole.name: Ham And Cheese Breakfast Casserole
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Spray a 2-quart baking dish with nonstick spray.
Whisk milk, eggs, milk, and salt together in a bowl.

Place about 3/4 of the bread cubes into the prepared baking dish and sprinkle with ham and 1 cup Cheddar cheese. Carefully pour egg mixture over top. Add remaining bread cubes and gently press all over to submerge into the liquid. Once all of the bread is coated by the egg mixture, sprinkle remaining Cheddar cheese over the top.
Bake in the preheated oven until light golden brown and set in the middle, about 40 minutes. Allow to cool for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.

ham-casserole-pie-argiro.name: Ham Caserole Pie
instructions: Allow the Leaf to thaw as trained.
If you want, you can make a homemade tease left with this resolution.
Lightly greene a baking pan.
Place the 1 Leaf down with olive oil and add the next one, sprinkle again with olive oil and make the third Leaf.
Cut the tomatoes into slides, remove the eyes and add them to a layer.
Cover with pepper slices, spread a leaf and repeat the same processes, layer of ham, cheese, tomato, pepper.
Cover the pie with the fifth sheet, oil the surface and cover with the last sheet.
Lighten the surface. Add some olive oil and some water.
Sprinkle with some black and white sesame.
Bake in a well preheated evening at 180oC in the suspensions on the bottom grill until the sheet is well browned up and down evening. It looks like pie, but it tastes like pizza.

ham-o-day-with-rye-aioli.name: Ham O’ Day With Rye Aioli

ingredients.item: . banyuls vinegar or white wine vinegar

instructions: Preheat oven to 200°. Thinly spread mustard on a parchment-lined baking sheet. Bake until dried, 1–1 ½ hours. Let cool; crumble.

Place eggs in a small saucepan; add water to cover by 1½”. Bring to a boil; remove from heat, cover, and let stand 5 minutes. Drain. Transfer eggs to a bowl of ice water; let cool. Peel; set aside (yolks should still be runny).

Toast caraway seeds in a small skillet over medium heat, tossing often, 1 minute. Add grapeseed oil and bread; cook, tossing occasionally, until bread is just golden, about 4 minutes. Let cool, then blend in a blender until as smooth as possible; set rye oil aside.

Blend eggs, vinegar, and lemon juice in a clean blender until smooth. With motor running, slowly add rye oil, then olive oil; blend until aioli is thickened. Pass through a sieve into a small bowl; season with salt.
Spread aioli on plates, top with ham, and sprinkle with mustard powder.

hanger-steak-with-chimol.name: Hanger Steak With Chimol

ingredients.prep: thinly sliced, seeds removed if desired
trimmed (peeled if using watermelon radishes), cut into bite-size pieces

ingredients.item: Torn cilantro leaves with tender stems

ingredients.prep: cut crosswise into 2–3 pieces, center membrane removed

instructions: Prepare a grill for medium-high heat; oil grate with vegetable oil. Toss lime juice, red onion, chiles, garlic, radishes, and cilantro in a medium bowl. Season generously with salt and pepper. Stir in ¼ cup olive oil. Let chimol sit at room temperature while the steak cooks.

Season steak with salt and pepper, then rub all over with remaining 1 Tbsp. olive oil. Grill, turning occasionally, until deeply browned on the outside and cooked to desired doneness, 8–12 minutes for medium-rare. Transfer to a cutting board and generously drizzle with Worcestershire sauce. Let sit 5 minutes before thinly slicing.
Serve steak with chimol, tortillas, and more Worcestershire sauce.

hard-cider-spritz.name: Hard Cider Spritz
instructions: For each cocktail, pour 4 oz. hard cider, 1½ oz. apple cider, ½ oz. rye whiskey, ¼ oz. Aperol, and ¼ oz. lemon juice into a rocks glass filled with ice. Top off with club soda. Gently stir to combine and garnish with an apple slice.

harvest-tomato-basil-rice-with-pancetta.name: Harvest Tomato-basil Rice With Pancetta
instructions: Heat in a large nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add pancetta and onion and cook, stirring frequently, until the pancetta begins to render and the onions begin to brown, about 4 minutes. Add the zucchini and cook until it begins to soften, about 3 minutes. Stir in the drained tomatoes and heat through, about 1 minute. Transfer mixture to a bowl.
Place reserved tomato juice is a measuring cup; add enough water to make 2 cups liquid.

In the same skillet, add the tomato juice-water mixture and bring to a boil over high heat. Stir in the Knorr® Rice Sides™ - Rice Pilaf. Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, until rice is tender, about 6 minutes.
Stir in pancetta, zucchini, onion, and tomato mixture. Heat through, 1 to 2 minutes. Sprinkle with basil and Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese.

hazelnut-cinnamon-crescents.name: Hazelnut Cinnamon Crescents
instructions: Place 1/2 cup sugar, nuts, and 1/4 teaspoon salt in processor. Using on/off turns, process until nuts are finely ground. Add butter in 4 additions, processing to blend after each addition. Add almond extract; process to blend. Add flour and cinnamon. Using on/off turns, process until dough comes together. Transfer to work surface. Form dough into ball; flatten into disk. Wrap in plastic and chill at least 2 hours. DO AHEAD Can be made 2 days ahead. Keep chilled.

Position 1 rack in top third and 1 rack in bottom third of oven; preheat to 177°C. Line 2 baking sheets with parchment paper. Measure 1 tablespoon dough; form into ball, then roll into 2 1/2-inch-long log, tapering slightly at both ends. Gently bend into crescent shape. (If dough is very cold, it may form cracks; smooth over cracks before continuing.) Place on prepared sheet. Repeat with remaining dough, spacing cookies about 1 1/2 inches apart.

Bake cookies until slightly puffed and edges turn golden brown, about 20 minutes. Sift remaining 1 cup sugar over hot cookies. Cool completely on sheets on rack. Roll cooled cookies in powdered sugar remaining on sheets. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 week ahead. Store in airtight containers at room temperature.

The hazelnut crescents and Triple-Ginger Cookies would both ship well. To make sure they arrive intact, pack the cookies in a metal tin between sheets of waxed paper. Ball up some waxed paper to place on top of the final cookie layer to make sure the cookies don't shift and break in transit.

hazelnut-cream-brownie-lezzet.name: Hazelnut Cream Brownie

ingredients.item: Half water cup removable nuts cream

instructions: 1. melt the butter in a sauce pot.
2. From January to humbles, you divide it to the bittercolate.
3. Let me mix and cool until completely melt in the kitchen.
4. Egg and powder sugar in a separate bowl thoroughly rub.
5. By adding the mixture of eggs to the buttered mixture that cools the mixture to continue rub.
6. Kakao add and mix salt until vanilla, flour and a pinch.
7. sulable cream nuts and talc;lableçcolate with the help of a spatula.
8. Bake for 25 minutes in the oven shed and before heated 160 degree of oven.
9. After taking part and serve by adding lemon ice cream and fill nuts.

hazelnut-gelato.name: Hazelnut Gelato
instructions: Combine milk, cream, and ⅓ cup sugar in a saucepan over medium heat; cook and stir until sugar dissolves, 3 to 5 minutes.

Beat egg yolks and remaining ⅓ cup sugar together in a bowl until light yellow, about 4 minutes. Pour ½ cup milk mixture into egg yolk mixture; whisk until smooth, whisking quickly to avoid scrambling eggs. Pour mixture back into the saucepan, stirring continuously; cook, stirring continuously, until custard is thick enough to coat the back of a metal spoon, 8 to 10 minutes. Remove from heat.
Stir chocolate hazelnut spread, espresso powder, and vanilla extract into custard until well combined; pour through a mesh strainer into a bowl. Refrigerate custard until cold, about 3 hours.
Pour custard into an ice cream maker and freeze according to manufacturer's instructions. Transfer to an airtight container and freeze to desired consistency.

healthified-chocolate-chip-quinoa-bars.name: Healthified Chocolate Chip Quinoa Bars
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Lightly grease a rimmed baking sheet.
Combine quinoa flakes, almond flour, flax seeds, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl.

Mix honey, applesauce, chocolate chips, eggs, and vanilla extract in another bowl. Add to quinoa flake mixture and mix well with your hands to combine. Press evenly on prepared baking sheet with your hands or a spatula.
Bake in the preheated oven until lightly golden, about 15 minutes. Cool for 20 minutes before cutting into 36 bars.

herby-dutch-baby-with-smoked-salmon.name: Herby Dutch Baby With Smoked Salmon

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven and place a medium ovenproof skillet, preferably cast iron, on rack. Preheat oven to 425°. Place onion in a small bowl; squeeze in juice of ½ lemon and add a big pinch of salt; set aside. Slice remaining ½ lemon into wedges and set aside for serving.

Blend eggs and egg white in a blender on high speed until very frothy, about 1 minute. Add garlic, spinach, milk, and 1 cup herbs and blend on high speed until well combined and very green. Add flour, cornstarch, and ¾ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt and season with lots of pepper; blend to combine.

Carefully remove skillet from oven. Add butter to pan and swirl to coat bottom. Immediately pour batter into pan and bake pancake until puffed and brown around the edges, 20–25 minutes. (It will start to deflate as soon as it comes out of the oven, but don’t worry, that’s normal.)
Top Dutch baby with smoked salmon, onion, and more herbs; season with pepper. Serve with reserved lemon wedges for squeezing over.

hibiscus-agua-fresca.name: Hibiscus Agua Fresca
instructions: Peel and thinly slice fresh ginger. Combine ginger, hibiscus flowers, and 3 cups boiling water in a medium pot. Let steep at room temperature for 30 minutes. Strain into a large pitcher, discarding solids. Add sugar; stir until dissolved. Add 8 cups cold water. Fill glasses with ice; pour agua fresca over and serve. DO AHEAD Can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill.

hot-dogs-with-poblanos-pepper-jack-and-t.name: Hot Dogs With Poblanos, Pepper Jack, And Tomatillo

ingredients.item: Uncured hot dogs or flavored sausages
Crumbled cotija cheese or feta cheese

instructions: Heat oil in large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add poblanos and onion; sprinkle with salt. Sauté until chiles soften, 10 to 12 minutes. Transfer mixture to bowl. Add hot dogs to same pan. Add 1 cup water; cover. Boil until heated through, 5 minutes.
Meanwhile, preheat broiler. Combine salsa verde and cilantro in small bowl.
Place 1 hot dog in each bun; place on baking sheet. Cover each with slices of cheese. Broil until cheese melts, about 2 minutes. Top with chile-onion mixture; then Cotija cheese and salsa.

hot-honey-chicken-thighs-with-fried-brea.name: Hot Honey Chicken Thighs With Fried Bread
instructions: Preheat oven to 450°. Mix garlic and 1 Tbsp. lemon juice in a medium bowl to combine. Pat chicken thighs dry with paper towels and place in bowl. Season with salt and toss to coat. Let chicken marinate at room temperature at least 20 minutes and up to 1 hour.
Meanwhile, bring honey and chile to a bare simmer in a small skillet over medium-low. Let hot honey cool.

Drizzle oil into a large heavy skillet, preferably cast iron, and place chicken thighs, skin side down, inside. Set over medium-high heat and cook until skin is golden brown underneath, 8–10 minutes. Transfer skillet to oven and bake chicken until cooked all the way through, 16–20 minutes. Pull chicken out of the oven and move to a plate. Save those pan juices in the skillet, though.

Place skillet with juices over medium heat and add bread. Fry bread until nicely toasted and golden brown, about 2 minutes per side. (You’re essentially making a large chicken fat–doused crouton here.) Transfer bread to paper towels to drain and sprinkle with a bit of salt.

Toss endive in a medium bowl with remaining 1 Tbsp. lemon juice and a drizzle of fat from skillet (if the pan is scorched or the drippings are all gone, use olive oil instead), season with salt, and toss to coat.

Tear the bread in half and poke it with a paring knife to create a few holes (this will help the bread soak up the chicken juices). Arrange on plates and top with chicken thighs. Scatter endive leaves around and drizzle some of the hot honey over the chicken (and the endive if you want).
Do Ahead: Chicken can be marinated 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

how-to-make-a-malaga-campero-comedera.name: How To Make A Malaga Campero
instructions: Saxony chicken breast with salt and pepper from both sides.
Warm and grease an iron or grill with olive oil.
Cooking the chicken breast from both sides till it remains doradite and juicy from inside.
Once ready, place the cheesebawks above the chicken to be slightly fused.
Open the light and have it inside.
Unite the cuts of bread with mayonnaise at best.
To put up the campero, place lettuce and tomato cuts at the bottom of the bread.
It incorporates chicken with cheese and both ham spots.
Close the cambut with the other slide of bread and have it on the plate until chrysp.
And ready, enjoy!

how-to-make-a-poboy-sandwich-step-by-ste.name: How To Make A Po'boy Sandwich step by step
how-to-make-a-poboy-sandwich-step-by-ste.original_name: Cómo hacer bocadillo Po´boy paso a paso
instructions: Put the pitted shrimp into a bowl. Jumped, add a pine of sweet peppermint, a few drops of lemon oblend and place them in the refrigerator.
Bat his egg and bahis his shrimp. Then put them through the frosted bread.

how-to-make-chicken-stew-comedera.name: How To Make Chicken Stew
instructions: Clean your chicken tigs and remove your skin.
It pits ion, pimenton and garlic into small cubes.
The tomato removes his skin, pits him small, and clamps him well with the help of a foot till it's a little as if it's purée.
Warm a big pot, put vegetarian oil and cook ion and pimenton over medium heat till ion gets translated.
Now you can add garlic and crushed tomato.
Put the chicken and Saxony thighs with all the spices.
Add 2 cups of water and cover. Let her cook for 20 minutes.
After this time put his potatoes and carrot previously minced into medium cubes.
Let cook another 15 minutes or as long as necessary until the Potato's soft.
Add the cilantro, put out the fire and let them stand for a few minutes.
That's it. That's a delicious Colombian-style chicken.

how-to-make-coconut-flan-step-by-step-co.name: How To Make Coconut Flan: Step By Step
how-to-make-coconut-flan-step-by-step-co.original_name: Cómo hacer flan de coco: paso a paso

ingredients.item: 1 / 2 cup of frosted coconut (optional to add more texture)

instructions: In a frying pan with medium heat, mix with water till dissolved. Cooking without stirring till I have a golden amber.
Stretch the caramel immediately into a flan or individual mold, tipping them to cover the background.
In a blender, it combines coconut milk, condensed milk, evaporate milk, eggs and vanilla extract. Mix up to achieve a homogenous consistency.
Si deseas, agrega el coco rallado para un toque adicional de textura.
Be sure that the caramel is firm (non cold) and put the mixture onto the caramel in the mold.
Place the mold in a tidal bathroom inside the oven.
Hornea at 180 been 3 been (177 been 3 been) for 60-70 minutes or as soon as a knife was inserted into the centre, it was clear.
Deja enfriar a temperatura ambiente y luego refrigera por al menos 4 horas o preferiblemente toda la noche.
Pasa un cuchillo por los bordes y desmolda sobre un plato amplio para que el caramelo cubra el flan.

how-to-make-country-gravy.name: How To Make Country Gravy

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Melt butter in a large skillet or saucepan over medium heat. Add sausage and bacon. Cook, breaking sausage into small pieces, until sausage is browned and bacon is almost crisp, about 10 minutes. Add light green onion to sausage mixture and saute until soft, about 3 minutes more.
Stir flour into meat mixture, 1 to 2 tablespoons at a time, until thoroughly combined and mixture is pasty. Cook, stirring often, to remove raw flour taste, 2 to 3 minutes.

Whisk milk into meat mixture, about 1 cup at a time, until combined. Continue to whisk until gravy begins to thicken, about 5 minutes. Turn heat to medium-high, bring gravy to a simmer. Season with cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper. Reduce heat to medium-low.
Continue to simmer gravy, stirring occasionally, until flavors have blended and gravy is thick, 10 to 15 minutes. Garnish with green onion and cayenne pepper.

how-to-make-gratin-mushrooms-comedera.name: How To Make Gratin Mushrooms
instructions: He starts his recipe and washed his mushrooms and cuts them into cuts. Reserve.
Warm up a frying pan and melt two tablespoons of butter.

While melting butter, stick the garlic and skip it. He then incorporates the mushrooms into slices, contiminates with some salt and pepper and cooks for 5 minutes with medium heat. Turn and put them out.
In a separate frying pan, melt the remaining two tablespoons of butter over medium heat. Add the flour and mix up and get a soft dough.
Vierte la crema de leche gradualmente, revolviendo constantemente para evitar grumos. Cocina la mezcla hasta que espese y se forme una salsa suave.
Remove the sauce from the fire and add half of the grated cheese. Revels till it melts and completely integrates.
Then mix this cream with the mushrooms salted into the plate.
Espolvorea el queso rallado restante sobre la parte superior del gratinado.
Baked in the pre-heated oven for about 20- 25 minutes, or until the cheese is golden and bubbling.

how-to-make-liver-in-tomato-sauce-comede.name: How To Make Liver In Tomato Sauce
how-to-make-liver-in-tomato-sauce-comede.original_name: Cómo hacer hígado en salsa de tomate

ingredients.item: 400 gr de salsa de tomate o tomates triturados

instructions: Rinse the liver under cold water and dry with paper. Cut the liver into medium pieces and make sure you remove any visible membrane or vein.
In a large frying pan, heat olive oil with medium heat. Add onion and garlic and have a cold till they are golden and fringe about 5 minutes.
It incorporates green and red peppers and cooks for about 5 more minutes, till they are tender.
Add tomato sauce or crushed tomatoes to frying pan. Cooking at medium low heat for 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally, until tomatoes get rid and the mixture gets a salsa consistency.
Add the laurel leaf and the sweet pimenton and mix well. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Incorporates liver pieces into tomato sauce. Add chicken or water and mix well. Cooking at medium low heat for 10-15 minutes, or until his liver's cooked but still tender.
Remove the bay leaf and adjust the date if necessary. Decor with fresh parsley minced before serving.

how-to-make-melted-cheese-with-chorizo-c.name: How To Make Melted Cheese with Chorizo
how-to-make-melted-cheese-with-chorizo-c.original_name: Cómo hacer queso fundido con chorizo
instructions: Loan the ingredients so you can work easier.
In a frying pan with medium heat, add the oil and once hot, add the chorizo to let cook for 6 minutes.
In a mud bowl, or some suitable for an oven adds most of the chorizo (reserve some of the chorizo for the end).
Then add the oaxaca cheese into strips to cover the whole container.
Woven up for 12 minutes or until the smoked cheese at a temperature of 177 been 3.
Serve and company with tortillas.

how-to-make-peruvian-pisco-sour-perus-em.name: How To Make Peruvian Pisco Sour (peru's Emblematic Cocktail)
how-to-make-peruvian-pisco-sour-perus-em.original_name: Cómo hacer Pisco Sour peruano (el cóctel emblemático de Perú)

ingredients.item: 60 ml pisco pisco (you can buy here)

instructions: The pisco, previously polished lemon juice, sugar syrup and egg clear are added to a pisco. Add some ice cubes to the pitcher.
Close well and shake strongly for a few seconds to mix all the ingredients and achieve good texture. The egg clear will form a characteristic pisco sour foam by stirring it.
Serves 3 times, keeping the ice from falling into the cocktail, so you can get better at that.
Add a few drops of narrow bitter onto the surface of the cocktail to decorate. You can also decorate the edge of the cup with sugar or a touch of cinnamon powder.

how-to-make-salmon-tataki-at-home-comede.name: How To Make Salmon Tataki At Home
how-to-make-salmon-tataki-at-home-comede.original_name: Cómo hacer tataki de salmón en casa
instructions: A medium frying pan with high heat adds oil.
When hot and with some tweezers, put the salmon into the frying pan and put it all around for a few seconds. We want to seal the exterior but have the inner remains raw.
When you put the steak across its sides, remove the salmon and place it in a plate. Let them stand for a few minutes.
Con un cuchillo filoso y con cuidado, corta rodajas de 1 cm de grosor.
Serve on your plate, sprinkle ajonjolí to taste and accompany with ponzu sauce to soak the fish. Enjoy.

how-to-make-vegan-cookies-comedera.name: How To Make Vegan Cookies

ingredients.item: 200 grs. de margarina o mantequilla vegana
∞ cup milk or canned coconut cream full-Fat (80 ml)

instructions: In a large bowl add margarine, sugar and bast to create.
Put the flour, corn starch and bate again to integrate everything very well.
Add coconut milk, vanilla and salt. Bat back to add all the ingredients.
Divide la mezcla en 5 partes iguales.
Toma una de las 5 partes y transfiere a una manga pastelera con boquilla redonda.

Lleva al refrigerador mientras preparas las siguientes galletas. Repite con toda la masa que te resta.

how-to-make-vegetable-curry-and-creamy-c.name: How To Make Vegetable Curry, And Creamy
how-to-make-vegetable-curry-and-creamy-c.original_name: Cómo hacer curry de verduras, fácil y cremoso

In a large frying pan, heat up olive oil and soften garlic and ginger dough till it release its scent and add onion, red pepper, ham and pumpkin. Cooking with medium heat till they start to get soft.
Agregar el curry en polvo, el comino y una pizca de sal. Mezclar bien para que las especias impregnen las verduras.
Gather coconut milk and vegetable stock. Let low heat cook for 10 minutes till the salsa thickens slightly and the vegetables are tender.
Decorate with frying and serve hot. Enjoy!

how-to-prepare-a-delicious-pan-seared-t-.name: How To Prepare A Delicious Pan-seared T-bone At Home
how-to-prepare-a-delicious-pan-seared-t-.original_name: Cómo preparar un rico T-bone al sartén en casa

ingredients.item: 1 t-bone steak of 600-700 g (preferably old or thick cut (minimum 3.5 cm))
1 / 2 cdite of freshly ground black pepper
2 cdas de aceite de oliva  (virgen extra)
A few drops of balsamic vinegar

instructions: Take the T-bone out of the refrigerator at least 40 minutes before cooking. That helps with a uniform cooking.
Con papel absorbente, seca bien ambos lados del corte. Sazona generosamente con sal en escamas y pimienta.
Wear a frying pan with cast iron or a thick bottom. Warm up with high heat till it starts to moist slightly
Add olive oil and place T-bone. Don't move him for the first 2 minutes to get a golden crusts. Kitchen 3-4 minutes per side, depending on the thickness and desired point (ideal: midterm).
Add butter, garlic, rosemary, thyme and old mustard to frying pan. It slightly inclines the frying pan and with a spoon, baits the meat with the butter flavoured for 1-2 minutes per side.
Mix Worcestershire sauce, honey and balsamic vinegar. A minute before withdrawing the meat, brush both sides with this blend for a spectacular tidal-salty finish.
Withdraw the T-bone and let it rest 8-10 minutes on a table, slightly covered with aluminum paper. That redistribute the juices.
Sirve entero para un efecto visual impresionante o filetea en tiras gruesas.

how-to-prepare-an-arugula-spinach-and-wa.name: How To Prepare An Arugula, Spinach And Walnut Salad
how-to-prepare-an-arugula-spinach-and-wa.original_name: Cómo preparar una ensalada de rúcula, espinacas y nueces

ingredients.item: 1/2 taza de nueces troceadas y tostadas
1 / 4 cup of minced goat cheese (optional for vegetarian, non-vegan)
2 cds of dehydrated cranberries or blonde raisins
1 cdite of black sesame seeds (to decorate)
2 cdas  de aceite de oliva  (extra virgen)
1 cda apple vinegar or white balsamic
1 cda de jugo de naranja fresco
1 cdote of bee honey (or an agave syrup for Vegan version)

instructions: Wash and dry well the ruula and spinach. Use an salads centrifuge if you have, to stop the dressing from dilute.
